blocks.output:
{
  "type": "text",
  "file": {
    "filePath": "/Users/apple/clawd/trade-erp/prisma/schema.prisma",
    "content": "  createdAt        DateTime       @default(now())
  updatedAt        DateTime       @updatedAt

  @@index([competitorName])
  @@index([type])
  @@index([analyzedAt])
  @@map("competitor_analyses")
}

model MarketResearch {
  id             String             @id @default(cuid())
  title          String
  categoryId     String?
  type           MarketResearchType @default(TREND)
  marketSize     String?
  growthRate     String?
  trendDirection TrendDirection     @default(STABLE)
  summary        String?
  content        String?
  sources        String[]
  attachments    String[]
  researchPeriod String?
  publishedAt    DateTime?
  createdAt      DateTime           @default(now())
  updatedAt      DateTime           @updatedAt
  category       ProductCategory?   @relation(fields: [categoryId], references: [id])

  @@index([categoryId])
  @@index([type])
  @@index([publishedAt])
  @@map("market_researches")
}

model ResearchAttachment {
  id           String             @id @default(cuid())
  productId    String?
  taskId       String?
  comparisonId String?
  fileName     String
  originalName String
  fileType     String
  mimeType     String
  fileSize     Int
  url          String
  thumbnailUrl String?
  description  String?
  uploadedBy   String?
  createdAt    DateTime           @default(now())
  updatedAt    DateTime           @updatedAt
  comparison   ProductComparison? @relation(fields: [comparisonId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  product      ProductResearch?   @relation(fields: [productId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  task         ResearchTask?      @relation(fields: [taskId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@index([productId])
  @@index([taskId])
  @@index([comparisonId])
  @@index([fileType])
  @@map("research_attachments")
}

model OutboundOrder {
  id            String              @id @default(cuid())
  outboundNo    String              @unique @default(cuid())
  orderId       String
  warehouseId   String
  status        String
  totalAmount   Decimal?
  createdAt     DateTime            @default(now())
  updatedAt     DateTime            @updatedAt
  shipmentId    String?
  inventoryLogs InventoryLog[]
  items         OutboundOrderItem[]
  order         Order               @relation("OrderOutboundOrders", fields: [orderId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  shipment      Shipment?           @relation(fields: [shipmentId], references: [id])

  @@index([orderId])
  @@index([status])
  @@index([createdAt])
  @@map("outbound_orders")
}

model OutboundOrderItem {
  id              String        @id @default(cuid())
  outboundOrderId String
  productId       String
  quantity        Int
  shippedQuantity Int           @default(0)
  unitPrice       Decimal?
  outboundOrder   OutboundOrder @relation(fields: [outboundOrderId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  product         Product       @relation(fields: [productId], references: [id])

  @@index([outboundOrderId])
  @@index([productId])
  @@map("outbound_order_items")
}

model ReportDefinition {
  id            String               @id @default(cuid())
  name          String
  code          String               @unique
  type          String
  description   String?
  config        Json                 @default("{}")
  columns       Json                 @default("[]")
  filters       Json                 @default("[]")
  isSystem      Boolean              @default(false)
  isActive      Boolean              @default(true)
  createdBy     String?
  createdAt     DateTime             @default(now())
  updatedAt     DateTime             @updatedAt
  data          ReportData[]
  exportLogs    ReportExportLog[]
  schedules     ReportSchedule[]
  subscriptions ReportSubscription[]

  @@index([type])
  @@index([isActive])
  @@map("report_definitions")
}

model ReportData {
  id          String           @id @default(cuid())
  reportId    String
  period      String
  periodStart DateTime
  periodEnd   DateTime
  data        Json             @default("{}")
  metrics     Json             @default("{}")
  generatedAt DateTime         @default(now())
  createdAt   DateTime         @default(now())
  report      ReportDefinition @relation(fields: [reportId], references: [id])

  @@index([reportId])
  @@index([period])
  @@index([periodStart, periodEnd])
  @@map("report_data")
}

model ReportSubscription {
  id         String           @id @default(cuid())
  reportId   String
  userId     String
  frequency  String
  format     String           @default("pdf")
  email      String?
  isActive   Boolean          @default(true)
  lastSentAt DateTime?
  nextSendAt DateTime?
  createdAt  DateTime         @default(now())
  updatedAt  DateTime         @updatedAt
  report     ReportDefinition @relation(fields: [reportId], references: [id])

  @@index([reportId])
  @@index([userId])
  @@index([isActive])
  @@map("report_subscriptions")
}

model ReportExportLog {
  id           String           @id @default(cuid())
  reportId     String
  userId       String
  exportType   String
  format       String
  fileUrl      String?
  fileSize     Int?
  status       String           @default("pending")
  errorMessage String?
  createdAt    DateTime         @default(now())
  completedAt  DateTime?
  report       ReportDefinition @relation(fields: [reportId], references: [id])

  @@index([reportId])
  @@index([userId])
  @@index([status])
  @@map("report_export_logs")
}

model ReportSchedule {
  id             String           @id @default(cuid())
  reportId       String
  name           String
  cronExpression String
  timezone       String           @default("Asia/Shanghai")
  config         Json             @default("{}")
  isActive       Boolean          @default(true)
  lastRunAt      DateTime?
  nextRunAt      DateTime?
  createdAt      DateTime         @default(now())
  updatedAt      DateTime         @updatedAt
  report         ReportDefinition @relation(fields: [reportId], references: [id])

  @@index([reportId])
  @@index([isActive])
  @@map("report_schedules")
}

model Permission {
  id          String           @id @default(cuid())
  name        String           @unique
  code        String           @unique
  displayName String
  module      String
  description String?
  isActive    Boolean          @default(true)
  createdAt   DateTime         @default(now())
  updatedAt   DateTime         @updatedAt
  roles       RolePermission[]

  @@index([module, isActive])
  @@index([code])
  @@map("permissions")
}

model Role {
  id          String           @id @default(cuid())
  name        String           @unique
  displayName String
  description String?
  isSystem    Boolean          @default(false)
  isActive    Boolean          @default(true)
  createdAt   DateTime         @default(now())
  updatedAt   DateTime         @updatedAt
  permissions RolePermission[]
  users       UserRole[]

  @@index([isActive])
  @@map("roles")
}

model UserRole {
  id        String   @id @default(cuid())
  userId    String
  roleId    String
  createdAt DateTime @default(now())
  role      Role     @relation(fields: [roleId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  user      User     @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@unique([userId, roleId])
  @@index([userId])
  @@index([roleId])
  @@map("user_roles")
}

model RolePermission {
  id           String     @id @default(cuid())
  roleId       String
  permissionId String
  createdAt    DateTime   @default(now())
  permission   Permission @relation(fields: [permissionId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  role         Role       @relation(fields: [roleId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@unique([roleId, permissionId])
  @@index([roleId])
  @@index([permissionId])
  @@map("role_permissions")
}

model UserRegistration {
  id           String    @id @default(cuid())
  username     String
  email        String    @unique
  passwordHash String
  name         String?
  phone        String?
  department   String?
  position     String?
  status       RegStatus @default(PENDING)
  approvedById String?
  approvedAt   DateTime?
  rejectReason String?
  remarks      String?
  createdAt    DateTime  @default(now())
  updatedAt    DateTime  @updatedAt
  approvedBy   User?     @relation(fields: [approvedById], references: [id])

  @@index([status])
  @@index([email])
  @@index([createdAt])
  @@map("user_registrations")
}

model PlatformAccount {
  id             String          @id @default(cuid())
  platformType   PlatformType
  platformName   String
  accountName    String
  accountId      String?
  shopId         String?
  clientId       String?
  clientSecret   String?
  accessToken    String?
  refreshToken   String?
  tokenExpiresAt DateTime?
  apiKey         String?
  apiSecret      String?
  authCode       String?
  region         String?
  currency       String          @default("USD")
  isTest         Boolean         @default(false)
  isActive       Boolean         @default(true)
  lastSyncAt     DateTime?
  syncStatus     String?
  errorMessage   String?
  userId         String?
  createdAt      DateTime        @default(now())
  updatedAt      DateTime        @updatedAt
  user           User?           @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id])
  orders         PlatformOrder[]
  profitDetails  ProfitDetail[]

  @@index([platformType, isActive])
  @@index([userId])
  @@index([accountId])
  @@index([shopId])
  @@map("platform_accounts")
}

model PlatformOrder {
  id                String          @id @default(cuid())
  platformOrderId   String
  platformOrderSn   String?
  platformAccountId String
  platformType      PlatformType
  sellerId          String?
  buyerId           String?
  buyerName         String?
  buyerEmail        String?
  buyerPhone        String?
  status            String
  paymentStatus     String?
  fulfillmentStatus String?
  orderDate         DateTime?
  paymentDate       DateTime?
  shipmentDate      DateTime?
  deliveryDate      DateTime?
  currency          String          @default("USD")
  totalAmount       Decimal         @db.Decimal(12, 2)
  subtotal          Decimal?        @db.Decimal(12, 2)
  shippingFee       Decimal?        @db.Decimal(10, 2)
  platformFee       Decimal?        @db.Decimal(10, 2)
  commissionFee     Decimal?        @db.Decimal(10, 2)
  tax               Decimal?        @db.Decimal(10, 2)
  discount          Decimal?        @db.Decimal(10, 2)
  coupon            Decimal?        @db.Decimal(10, 2)
  shippingAddress   Json?
  billingAddress    Json?
  buyerMessage      String?
  notes             String?
  internalOrderId   String?
  items             Json            @default("[]")
  tags              String[]
  syncVersion       Int             @default(1)
  createdAt         DateTime        @default(now())
  updatedAt         DateTime        @updatedAt
  platformAccount   PlatformAccount @relation(fields: [platformAccountId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  profitDetails     ProfitDetail[]

  @@unique([platformOrderId, platformAccountId])
  @@index([platformAccountId, orderDate])
  @@index([platformType, status])
  @@index([internalOrderId])
  @@index([orderDate])
  @@map("platform_orders")
}

model OverseasWarehouse {
  id             String                @id @default(cuid())
  name           String
  code           String                @unique
  type           OverseasWarehouseType
  country        String
  province       String?
  city           String?
  address        String
  postcode       String?
  contactName    String?
  contactPhone   String?
  email          String?
  warehouseId    String?
  region         String?
  timezone       String                @default("UTC")
  isActive       Boolean               @default(true)
  apiEnabled     Boolean               @default(false)
  apiKey         String?
  apiUrl         String?
  fbaSyncEnabled Boolean               @default(false)
  lastSyncAt     DateTime?
  createdAt      DateTime              @default(now())
  updatedAt      DateTime              @updatedAt
  inventory      OverseasInventory[]

  @@index([type, country, isActive])
  @@index([code])
  @@map("overseas_warehouses")
}

model OverseasInventory {
  id                 String            @id @default(cuid())
  warehouseId        String
  productId          String
  sku                String
  fnsku              String?
  asin               String?
  availableQty       Int               @default(0)
  inboundQty         Int               @default(0)
  reservedQty        Int               @default(0)
  totalQty           Int               @default(0)
  lastFulfillableQty Int?
  costPerUnit        Decimal?          @db.Decimal(10, 2)
  location           String?
  lastSyncAt         DateTime?
  updatedAtSource    DateTime?
  createdAt          DateTime          @default(now())
  updatedAt          DateTime          @updatedAt
  product            Product           @relation(fields: [productId], references: [id])
  warehouse          OverseasWarehouse @relation(fields: [warehouseId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@unique([warehouseId, productId])
  @@index([warehouseId])
  @@index([sku])
  @@index([fnsku])
  @@index([asin])
  @@map("overseas_inventory")
}

model ApprovalFlow {
  id          String             @id @default(cuid())
  name        String
  type        ApprovalType
  description String?
  config      Json               @default("{}")
  isActive    ApprovalFlowStatus @default(ACTIVE)
  isSystem    Boolean            @default(false)
  createdAt   DateTime           @default(now())
  updatedAt   DateTime           @updatedAt
  records     ApprovalRecord[]

  @@index([type, isActive])
  @@map("approval_flows")
}

model ApprovalRecord {
  id           String               @id @default(cuid())
  flowId       String
  flowCode     String?
  title        String
  type         ApprovalType
  businessId   String
  businessType String
  status       ApprovalRecordStatus @default(PENDING)
  currentStep  Int                  @default(1)
  totalSteps   Int                  @default(1)
  initiatorId  String
  approverId   String?
  initiatedAt  DateTime             @default(now())
  approvedAt   DateTime?
  updatedAt    DateTime             @updatedAt
  data         Json                 @default("{}")
  comments     String?
  history      ApprovalHistory[]
  approver     User?                @relation("ApprovalApprover", fields: [approverId], references: [id])
  flow         ApprovalFlow         @relation(fields: [flowId], references: [id])
  initiator    User                 @relation("ApprovalInitiator", fields: [initiatorId], references: [id])

  @@index([flowId])
  @@index([status])
  @@index([initiatorId])
  @@index([approverId])
  @@index([businessId, businessType])
  @@index([initiatedAt])
  @@map("approval_records")
}

model ApprovalHistory {
  id         String         @id @default(cuid())
  recordId   String
  step       Int
  approverId String
  action     ApprovalAction
  comments   String?
  actionAt   DateTime       @default(now())
  approver   User           @relation("ApprovalHistoryApprover", fields: [approverId], references: [id])
  record     ApprovalRecord @relation(fields: [recordId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@index([recordId])
  @@index([approverId])
  @@index([actionAt])
  @@map("approval_history")
}

model Account {
  id             String          @id @default(cuid())
  name           String
  type           AccountType
  accountNumber  String?
  bankName       String?
  branchName     String?
  currency       String          @default("CNY")
  openingBalance Decimal         @default(0) @db.Decimal(14, 2)",
    "numLines": 500,
    "startLine": 1001,
    "totalLines": 2185
  }
}

{
  "type": "text",
  "file": {
    "filePath": "/Users/apple/clawd/trade-erp/prisma/schema.prisma",
    "content": "  currentBalance Decimal         @default(0) @db.Decimal(14, 2)
  isActive       Boolean         @default(true)
  notes          String?
  createdAt      DateTime        @default(now())
  updatedAt      DateTime        @updatedAt
  commissions    Commission[]
  expenses       Expense[]
  reimbursements Reimbursement[]
  transactions   Transaction[]

  @@index([type, isActive])
  @@map("accounts")
}

model Transaction {
  id                  String            @id @default(cuid())
  transactionNo       String            @unique
  accountId           String
  type                TransactionType
  amount              Decimal           @db.Decimal(14, 2)
  currency            String            @default("CNY")
  exchangeRate        Decimal           @default(1) @db.Decimal(10, 6)
  amountCny           Decimal           @db.Decimal(14, 2)
  counterParty        String?
  counterPartyAccount String?
  description         String?
  category            String?
  businessType        String?
  businessId          String?
  transactionDate     DateTime
  status              TransactionStatus @default(CONFIRMED)
  receiptUrl          String?
  notes               String?
  createdById         String
  createdAt           DateTime          @default(now())
  updatedAt           DateTime          @updatedAt
  commissions         Commission[]
  expenses            Expense[]
  reimbursements      Reimbursement[]
  account             Account           @relation(fields: [accountId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  createdBy           User              @relation(fields: [createdById], references: [id])

  @@index([accountId, transactionDate])
  @@index([type, category])
  @@index([businessType, businessId])
  @@index([transactionDate])
  @@index([status])
  @@map("transactions")
}

model Expense {
  id             String              @id @default(cuid())
  expenseNo      String              @unique
  applicantId    String
  department     String?
  category       ExpenseCategory
  amount         Decimal             @db.Decimal(12, 2)
  currency       String              @default("CNY")
  description    String
  receiptCount   Int                 @default(0)
  receiptUrls    String[]
  expenseDate    DateTime
  status         ReimbursementStatus @default(DRAFT)
  approvalId     String?
  approvedAt     DateTime?
  paidAt         DateTime?
  accountId      String?
  transactionId  String?
  notes          String?
  createdAt      DateTime            @default(now())
  updatedAt      DateTime            @updatedAt
  account        Account?            @relation(fields: [accountId], references: [id])
  applicant      User                @relation(fields: [applicantId], references: [id])
  transaction    Transaction?        @relation(fields: [transactionId], references: [id])
  reimbursements Reimbursement[]     @relation("ReimbursementExpenses")

  @@index([applicantId, status])
  @@index([category])
  @@index([expenseDate])
  @@index([status])
  @@map("expenses")
}

model Reimbursement {
  id              String              @id @default(cuid())
  reimbursementNo String              @unique
  expenseIds      String[]
  applicantId     String
  totalAmount     Decimal             @db.Decimal(12, 2)
  status          ReimbursementStatus @default(DRAFT)
  description     String?
  currentStep     Int                 @default(1)
  approvedById    String?
  approvedAt      DateTime?
  paidAt          DateTime?
  accountId       String?
  transactionId   String?
  notes           String?
  createdAt       DateTime            @default(now())
  updatedAt       DateTime            @updatedAt
  account         Account?            @relation(fields: [accountId], references: [id])
  applicant       User                @relation(fields: [applicantId], references: [id])
  transaction     Transaction?        @relation(fields: [transactionId], references: [id])
  expenses        Expense[]           @relation("ReimbursementExpenses")

  @@index([applicantId, status])
  @@index([status])
  @@index([createdAt])
  @@map("reimbursements")
}

model ProfitCalculation {
  id               String                  @id @default(cuid())
  calculationNo    String                  @unique
  name             String
  periodType       String
  period           String
  startDate        DateTime
  endDate          DateTime
  status           ProfitCalculationStatus @default(DRAFT)
  totalRevenue     Decimal                 @db.Decimal(14, 2)
  totalCost        Decimal                 @db.Decimal(14, 2)
  totalExpense     Decimal                 @db.Decimal(14, 2)
  totalProfit      Decimal                 @db.Decimal(14, 2)
  netProfit        Decimal                 @db.Decimal(14, 2)
  profitMargin     Decimal?                @db.Decimal(5, 2)
  orderCount       Int                     @default(0)
  platformStats    Json                    @default("{}")
  calculatedBy     String
  calculatedAt     DateTime?
  createdAt        DateTime                @default(now())
  updatedAt        DateTime                @updatedAt
  calculatedByUser User                    @relation(fields: [calculatedBy], references: [id])
  details          ProfitDetail[]

  @@index([periodType, period])
  @@index([status])
  @@index([startDate, endDate])
  @@index([createdAt])
  @@map("profit_calculations")
}

model ProfitDetail {
  id                    String            @id @default(cuid())
  calculationId         String
  orderId               String?
  platformOrderId       String?
  productId             String?
  sku                   String?
  platformType          PlatformType?
  platformAccountId     String?
  salesRepId            String?
  currency              String            @default("USD")
  exchangeRate          Decimal           @default(1) @db.Decimal(10, 6)
  salesAmount           Decimal           @db.Decimal(12, 2)
  shippingIncome        Decimal?          @db.Decimal(10, 2)
  totalIncome           Decimal           @db.Decimal(12, 2)
  productCost           Decimal           @db.Decimal(12, 2)
  shippingCost          Decimal?          @db.Decimal(10, 2)
  internationalShipping Decimal?          @db.Decimal(10, 2)
  warehouseCost         Decimal?          @db.Decimal(10, 2)
  packagingCost         Decimal?          @db.Decimal(10, 2)
  platformFee           Decimal?          @db.Decimal(10, 2)
  paymentFee            Decimal?          @db.Decimal(10, 2)
  adFee                 Decimal?          @db.Decimal(10, 2)
  tax                   Decimal?          @db.Decimal(10, 2)
  otherFees             Decimal?          @db.Decimal(10, 2)
  totalCost             Decimal           @db.Decimal(12, 2)
  grossProfit           Decimal           @db.Decimal(12, 2)
  netProfit             Decimal           @db.Decimal(12, 2)
  profitMargin          Decimal?          @db.Decimal(5, 2)
  totalIncomeCny        Decimal           @db.Decimal(12, 2)
  totalCostCny          Decimal           @db.Decimal(12, 2)
  netProfitCny          Decimal           @db.Decimal(12, 2)
  quantity              Int               @default(1)
  tags                  String[]
  createdAt             DateTime          @default(now())
  commissionId          String?
  calculation           ProfitCalculation @relation(fields: [calculationId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  commission            Commission?       @relation("CommissionProfitDetails", fields: [commissionId], references: [id])
  order                 Order?            @relation(fields: [orderId], references: [id])
  platformAccount       PlatformAccount?  @relation(fields: [platformAccountId], references: [id])
  platformOrder         PlatformOrder?    @relation(fields: [platformOrderId], references: [id])
  product               Product?          @relation(fields: [productId], references: [id])
  salesRep              User?             @relation(fields: [salesRepId], references: [id])

  @@index([calculationId])
  @@index([orderId])
  @@index([platformOrderId])
  @@index([productId])
  @@index([salesRepId])
  @@index([platformType])
  @@map("profit_details")
}

model PerformanceRule {
  id                String              @id @default(cuid())
  name              String
  code              String              @unique
  type              PerformanceRuleType
  calculationMethod CalculationMethod
  department        String?
  position          String?
  targetUserType    String?
  isActive          Boolean             @default(true)
  effectiveFrom     DateTime
  effectiveTo       DateTime?
  baseFormula       String?
  tierConfig        Json                @default("[]")
  conditionConfig   Json                @default("{}")
  description       String?
  createdAt         DateTime            @default(now())
  updatedAt         DateTime            @updatedAt
  commissions       Commission[]
  metrics           PerformanceMetric[]

  @@index([type, isActive])
  @@index([effectiveFrom, effectiveTo])
  @@map("performance_rules")
}

model PerformanceMetric {
  id           String          @id @default(cuid())
  ruleId       String
  userId       String
  period       String
  periodStart  DateTime
  periodEnd    DateTime
  salesAmount  Decimal         @db.Decimal(14, 2)
  orderCount   Int             @default(0)
  newCustomers Int             @default(0)
  grossProfit  Decimal         @db.Decimal(14, 2)
  netProfit    Decimal         @db.Decimal(14, 2)
  targetAmount Decimal?        @db.Decimal(14, 2)
  achievement  Decimal?        @db.Decimal(5, 2)
  score        Decimal?        @db.Decimal(5, 2)
  calculatedAt DateTime?
  createdAt    DateTime        @default(now())
  updatedAt    DateTime        @updatedAt
  rule         PerformanceRule @relation(fields: [ruleId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  user         User            @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id])

  @@unique([ruleId, userId, period])
  @@index([userId, period])
  @@index([ruleId])
  @@index([periodStart, periodEnd])
  @@map("performance_metrics")
}

model Commission {
  id               String           @id @default(cuid())
  commissionNo     String           @unique
  userId           String
  period           String
  startDate        DateTime
  endDate          DateTime
  status           CommissionStatus @default(DRAFT)
  ruleId           String?
  salesCommission  Decimal          @default(0) @db.Decimal(12, 2)
  profitCommission Decimal          @default(0) @db.Decimal(12, 2)
  targetBonus      Decimal          @default(0) @db.Decimal(12, 2)
  otherBonus       Decimal          @default(0) @db.Decimal(12, 2)
  adjustment       Decimal          @default(0) @db.Decimal(12, 2)
  totalCommission  Decimal          @default(0) @db.Decimal(12, 2)
  totalSales       Decimal          @default(0) @db.Decimal(14, 2)
  totalProfit      Decimal          @default(0) @db.Decimal(14, 2)
  orderCount       Int              @default(0)
  approvedById     String?
  approvedAt       DateTime?
  paidAt           DateTime?
  accountId        String?
  transactionId    String?
  notes            String?
  details          Json             @default("[]")
  createdAt        DateTime         @default(now())
  updatedAt        DateTime         @updatedAt
  account          Account?         @relation(fields: [accountId], references: [id])
  approvedBy       User?            @relation("CommissionApprovedBy", fields: [approvedById], references: [id])
  rule             PerformanceRule? @relation(fields: [ruleId], references: [id])
  transaction      Transaction?     @relation(fields: [transactionId], references: [id])
  user             User             @relation("CommissionUser", fields: [userId], references: [id])
  profitDetails    ProfitDetail[]   @relation("CommissionProfitDetails")

  @@index([userId, period])
  @@index([status])
  @@index([period])
  @@index([createdAt])
  @@map("commissions")
}

enum RoleEnum {
  ADMIN
  SALES
  PURCHASING
  WAREHOUSE
  VIEWER
}

enum CustomerStatus {
  ACTIVE
  INACTIVE
  BLACKLISTED
}

enum ProductStatus {
  ACTIVE
  DISCONTINUED
  DEVELOPING
}

enum InquiryStatus {
  NEW
  CONTACTED
  QUOTED
  NEGOTIATING
  WON
  LOST
}

enum Priority {
  LOW
  MEDIUM
  HIGH
  URGENT
}

enum FollowUpType {
  CALL
  EMAIL
  MEETING
  MESSAGE
  OTHER
}

enum QuotationStatus {
  DRAFT
  SENT
  VIEWED
  ACCEPTED
  REJECTED
  EXPIRED
}

enum OrderStatus {
  PENDING
  CONFIRMED
  IN_PRODUCTION
  READY
  SHIPPED
  DELIVERED
  COMPLETED
  CANCELLED
}

enum ApprovalStatus {
  NOT_REQUIRED
  PENDING
  APPROVED
  REJECTED
}

enum ProductionStatus {
  NOT_STARTED
  IN_PROGRESS
  COMPLETED
  DELAYED
}

enum ProductionRecordStatus {
  PLANNED
  IN_PROGRESS
  COMPLETED
  ON_HOLD
  CANCELLED
}

enum QualityCheckType {
  RAW_MATERIAL
  IN_PROCESS
  FINAL
  PRE_SHIPMENT
}

enum QualityCheckStatus {
  PENDING
  IN_PROGRESS
  PASSED
  FAILED
  CONDITIONAL
}

enum ShipmentStatus {
  PENDING
  BOOKED
  IN_TRANSIT
  SHIPPED
  DELIVERED
}

enum SupplierStatus {
  ACTIVE
  INACTIVE
  BLACKLISTED
  PENDING
}

enum SupplierType {
  DOMESTIC
  OVERSEAS
}

enum SupplierLevel {
  STRATEGIC
  PREFERRED
  NORMAL
  RESTRICTED
}

enum PurchaseOrderStatus {
  PENDING
  CONFIRMED
  IN_PRODUCTION
  READY
  RECEIVED
  COMPLETED
  CANCELLED
}

enum ReceiptStatus {
  PENDING
  PARTIAL
  COMPLETED
  CANCELLED
}

enum PaymentStatus {
  PENDING
  PROCESSING
  COMPLETED
  FAILED
  CANCELLED
}

enum MovementType {
  IN
  OUT
  ADJUSTMENT
  TRANSFER
  RETURN
}

enum InboundType {
  PURCHASE_IN
  RETURN_IN
  ADJUSTMENT_IN
  TRANSFER_IN
  OTHER_IN
}

enum InboundStatus {
  PENDING
  PARTIAL
  COMPLETED
  CANCELLED
}

enum WarehouseStatus {
  ACTIVE
  INACTIVE
}

enum InventoryLogType {
  IN
  OUT
  ADJUSTMENT
  TRANSFER
  RETURN
}

enum AttributeType {
  TEXT
  NUMBER
  DECIMAL
  BOOLEAN
  DATE
  SELECT
  MULTI_SELECT
  LONG_TEXT
  URL
  IMAGE
  FILE
}

enum ResearchStatus {
  DRAFT
  IN_PROGRESS
  REVIEW
  APPROVED
  REJECTED
  ARCHIVED",

blocks.text:
以下是对 `prisma/schema.prisma` 文件的分析报告：

---

## 1. 模型命名一致性

**结论：✅ 全部使用单数命名，一致。**

所有 model 均使用单数形式，没有出现混用。例如 `Customer`（不是 `Customers`）、`Order`、`Product`、`UserRole`、`ProductResearch` 等，全部遵循 Prisma 推荐惯例。

无问题。

---

## 2. 缺少索引的外键字段

以下是 **没有显式 `@@index` 覆盖的外键字段**（按严重程度排列）：

### 🔴 高频查询字段，建议补充索引

| 模型 | 外键字段 | 说明 |
|------|----------|------|
| `CustomerContact` | `customerId` | 按客户查联系人是高频操作 |
| `FollowUp` | `inquiryId` | 按询盘查跟进记录 |
| `Quotation` | `customerId`, `inquiryId` | 按客户/询盘查报价单 |
| `QuotationItem` | `quotationId`, `productId` | 关联查询高频 |
| `Payment` | `orderId` | 按订单查付款记录 |
| `ProductionRecord` | `orderId`, `productId` | 按订单查生产记录 |
| `QualityCheck` | `orderId` | 按订单查质检 |
| `QualityCheckItem` | `qualityCheckId` | 按质检查明细 |
| `SupplierEvaluation` | `supplierId` | 按供应商查评估 |
| `PurchaseReceipt` | `purchaseOrderId` | 按采购单查收货 |
| `SupplierPayment` | `purchaseOrderId` | 按采购单查付款 |
| `InboundOrder` | `purchaseOrderId`, `supplierId` | 按采购单/供应商查入库 |
| `ProductResearchAttributeValue` | `productId`, `attributeId` | 关联查询 |
| `ProductComparison` | `categoryId`, `productResearchId` | |
| `ProductComparisonItem` | `comparisonId`, `productId` | |
| `ResearchTask` | `categoryId` | |
| `ResearchAttachment` | `productId`, `taskId`, `comparisonId` | |
| `OutboundOrder` | `shipmentId` | |
| `ProfitDetail` | `commissionId`, `platformAccountId`, `platformType` | 利润明细表数据量大，缺少这些索引会影响查询性能 |
| `Commission` | `ruleId`, `approvedById`, `accountId`, `transactionId` | |
| `PerformanceMetric` | `userId`（只有复合索引 `[userId, period]`，单独查用户时不会命中） | |
| `UserRole` | `userId`, `roleId` | 虽然不常用单独查询，但权限校验时可能用到 |
| `UserRegistration` | `approvedById` | |
| `PlatformAccount` | `userId` | |

### 🟡 复合索引已覆盖的情况（可忽略）

- `ProductAttributeValue` 的 `attributeId` 和 `productId` 有冗余索引（`@@index([attributeId])` 和 `@@index([attributeId], map: "...")` 重复），可以清理。
- `InventoryItem` 的 `productId` 属于 `@@unique([productId, warehouse])` 的一部分，PostgreSQL 会自动创建前缀索引，可以不加。

---

## 3. 缺少 `onDelete` 级联的关系

这是 **最需要关注的问题**。大量父子关系缺少 `onDelete: Cascade` 或 `onDelete: Restrict`，删除父记录时会在数据库层面产生约束冲突或留下孤儿数据。

### 🔴 高风险（应有级联但缺失）

| 模型 | 关系字段 | 引用模型 | 建议 |
|------|----------|----------|------|
| `CustomerContact` | `customerId` → `Customer` | ✅ 已有 Cascade |
| `Inquiry` | `customerId` → `Customer` | ❌ 缺少 — 删除客户时应限制或级联 |
| `FollowUp` | `inquiryId` → `Inquiry` | ✅ 已有 Cascade |
| `Quotation` | `customerId` → `Customer` | ❌ 缺少 |
| `QuotationItem` | `quotationId` → `Quotation` | ✅ 已有 Cascade |
| `Order` | `customerId` → `Customer` | ❌ 缺少 |
| `OrderItem` | `orderId` → `Order` | ✅ 已有 Cascade |
| `Payment` | `orderId` → `Order` | ❌ 缺少 — 删除订单时付款记录变孤儿 |
| `Shipment` | `orderId` → `Order` | ❌ 缺少 |
| `ProductionRecord` | `orderId` → `Order` | ❌ 缺少 |
| `QualityCheck` | `orderId` → `Order` | ❌ 缺少 |
| `QualityCheckItem` | `qualityCheckId` → `QualityCheck` | ✅ 已有 Cascade |
| `PurchaseOrder` | `supplierId` → `Supplier` | ❌ 缺少 |
| `PurchaseOrderItem` | `purchaseOrderId` → `PurchaseOrder` | ✅ 已有 Cascade |
| `PurchaseReceipt` | `purchaseOrderId` → `PurchaseOrder` | ❌ 缺少 |
| `PurchaseReceiptItem` | `receiptId` → `PurchaseReceipt` | ✅ 已有 Cascade |
| `SupplierPayment` | `purchaseOrderId` → `PurchaseOrder` | ❌ 缺少 |
| `InventoryItem` | `productId` → `Product` | ❌ 缺少 — 删除产品时库存变孤儿 |
| `InboundOrderItem` | `inboundOrderId` → `InboundOrder` | ✅ 已有 Cascade |
| `InventoryLog` | `productId`, `inboundOrderId`, `outboundOrderId` → 多个 | ❌ 全部缺少 |
| `SupplierContact` | `supplierId` → `Supplier` | ✅ 已有 Cascade |
| `SupplierEvaluation` | `supplierId` → `Supplier` | ❌ 缺少 |
| `OutboundOrder` | `orderId` → `Order` | ✅ 已有 Cascade |
| `OutboundOrderItem` | `outboundOrderId` → `OutboundOrder` | ✅ 已有 Cascade |
| `ProductAttributeValue` | `productId` → `Product` | ✅ 已有 Cascade |
| `ProductResearchAttributeValue` | `productId` → `ProductResearch` | ✅ 已有 Cascade |
| `ProductComparisonItem` | `comparisonId` → `ProductComparison` | ✅ 已有 Cascade |
| `ResearchAttachment` | 多个 → 多个 | ✅ 已有 Cascade |
| `ReportData` | `reportId` → `ReportDefinition` | ❌ 缺少 |
| `ReportSubscription` | `reportId` → `ReportDefinition` | ❌ 缺少 |
| `ReportExportLog` | `reportId` → `ReportDefinition` | ❌ 缺少 |
| `ReportSchedule` | `reportId` → `ReportDefinition` | ❌ 缺少 |
| `ApprovalHistory` | `recordId` → `ApprovalRecord` | ✅ 已有 Cascade |
| `ApprovalRecord` | `flowId` → `ApprovalFlow` | ❌ 缺少 |
| `ProfitDetail` | `calculationId` → `ProfitCalculation` | ✅ 已有 Cascade |
| `PerformanceMetric` | `ruleId` → `PerformanceRule` | ✅ 已有 Cascade |
| `Commission` | `ruleId` → `PerformanceRule` | ❌ 缺少 |
| `Expense` | `applicantId` → `User` | ❌ 缺少 |
| `Reimbursement` | `applicantId` → `User` | ❌ 缺少 |
| `ProfitCalculation` | `calculatedBy` → `User` | ❌ 缺少 |
| `Transaction` | `createdBy` → `User` | ❌ 缺少 |
| `InventoryLog` | `productId` → `Product` | ❌ 缺少 |
| `OverseasInventory` | `productId` → `Product` | ❌ 缺少 |

### 总结统计

- **已有 `onDelete: Cascade`**：约 20+ 处
- **缺少 onDelete 的关系**：约 40+ 处

对于 **子表记录**（明细、日志、附件等），应设 `onDelete: Cascade`；对于 **业务主表**（客户、供应商、用户），应设 `onDelete: Restrict` 以防止误删。

---

## 4. `@@map` 检查

**结论：✅ 所有模型的 `@@map` 均正确设置。**

所有 model 都使用了复数形式的 `@@map` 映射到数据库表名，风格统一：

- `model User` → `@@map("users")`
- `model Customer` → `@@map("customers")`
- `model FollowUp` → `@@map("follow_ups")`
- `model QuotationItem` → `@@map("quotation_items")`
- `model ProductAttributeValue` → `@@map("product_attribute_values")`
- `model RolePermission` → `@@map("role_permissions")`

命名风格一致：小写 + 下划线分隔 + 复数形式。无问题。

---

## 总结

| 检查项 | 状态 | 问题数 |
|--------|------|--------|
| 模型命名一致性 | ✅ 通过 | 0 |
| 外键索引覆盖 | ⚠️ 有缺失 | 约 25 个外键缺少索引 |
| onDelete 级联设置 | ⚠️ 大量缺失 | 约 40+ 个关系缺少 onDelete |
| @@map 映射 | ✅ 通过 | 0 |

**最需要优先处理的是第 3 项（onDelete）**：大量子表与父表之间没有设置删除策略，在生产环境中删除主记录（如客户、订单、产品）时会导致外键约束错误或数据不一致。
